headline: Stop the Sunday spiral, lock in discipline now
summary: You're 0.55 kg/week behind target; today's food discipline and one intense 60-minute workout prevents further slippage.
details: Today: Replace emotional eating with Huel meals and water—no discretionary snacking, especially this Sunday when you're most vulnerable. Hit the rowing machine or treadmill for 60 hard minutes to burn ~2500 kJ and break the momentum-killing pattern. You need 0.60 kg/week discipline across 387 days to reach 88 kg; that discipline starts today, not someday.
